title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the two photographs and answer the question. You have about one minute.

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say what the advantages and disadvantages of different working styles might be and how they affect productivity.

images.label: A
images.description: A diverse team of professionals around a large conference table, engaged in a lively brainstorming session with notes and laptops in front of them

images.label: B
images.description: Two colleagues standing at a whiteboard covered in diagrams, clearly debating an idea with animated expressions

followUp.question: Which of these work situations do you think leads to the best outcomes, and why?

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say what kind of leader each person appears to be and what qualities make an effective leader.

images.label: D
images.description: A manager giving a confident, energetic presentation to a large audience in a modern auditorium, using bold visuals on a big screen

images.label: E
images.description: A team leader sitting informally with staff members in a circle, listening attentively to someone speaking, with a relaxed and open posture

followUp.question: Do you think leadership is a skill that can be learned, or do people have to be born with it?
